PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerLabel WHERE {
  ?hotel wdt:P31 wd:Q28903 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q850321 ; rdfs:label ?hotelLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?hotelLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(LCASE(?hotelLabel) , 'delano'))
  .
  ?hotel wdt:P127 ?owner .
  ?owner rdfs:label ?ownerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?ownerLabel) = 'en')
}
